title: 6 tar Commands for Faster Archive Work
summary: Pack, inspect, and extract archives with tar commands for backups, compressed bundles, selective extraction, and cleaner archive exports.

test_environment.runtime: tar available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Replace the example files and folders before running the commands.
Run create or extract commands from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/tar_commands_for_faster_archive_work.sh with real local files and folders.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example files or folders and run create or extract commands from a writable directory.
